speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Is there no way for men to be, but women

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Must be half-workers? We are all bastards,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And that most venerable man which I

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Did call my father was I know not where

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: When I was stamped. Some coiner with his tools

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Made me a counterfeit; yet my mother seemed

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The Dian of that time; so doth my wife

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The nonpareil of this. O, vengeance, vengeance!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Me of my lawful pleasure she restrained

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And prayed me oft forbearance; did it with

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: A pudency so rosy the sweet view on ’t

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Might well have warmed old Saturn, that I thought her

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: As chaste as unsunned snow. O, all the devils!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: This yellow Iachimo in an hour, was ’t not?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Or less? At first? Perchance he spoke not, but,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Like a full-acorned boar, a German one,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Cried “O!” and mounted; found no opposition

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: But what he looked for should oppose and she

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Should from encounter guard. Could I find out

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The woman’s part in me—for there’s no motion

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: That tends to vice in man but I affirm

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: It is the woman’s part: be it lying, note it,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The woman’s; flattering, hers; deceiving, hers;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Lust and rank thoughts, hers, hers; revenges, hers;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Ambitions, covetings, change of prides, disdain,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Nice longing, slanders, mutability,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: All faults that have a name, nay, that hell knows,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Why, hers, in part or all, but rather all.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: For even to vice

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: They are not constant, but are changing still

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: One vice but of a minute old for one

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Not half so old as that. I’ll write against them,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Detest them, curse them. Yet ’tis greater skill

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: In a true hate to pray they have their will;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The very devils cannot plague them better.
